query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, ur.role as app_role 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN userRoles ur ON u.id = ur.userId 
WHERE u.openId = '8eTuKZeb2B7DcBjWKH7ygf';
command:
